textByHash.96aa3c02e29d141a419091f6788c8329a864ed47: Bring me locks, find in the catacombs... I repair coffin with locks.
textByHash.919034424cef695c1d273aa73f8f5c83168f4b07: Bring me locks, I fix coffin with locks...
textByHash.817af84170672dfeeff6e8d258617d802109e192: That is it, give to me now and I repair the coffin.
textByHash.77719354675f6e2ef10bf2c7a2e0e5fd8d69d993: You ain't got no broken coffin for me to fix. If you need one, just ask.
textByHash.684c579f6106ca774fc06f06e0f4703f133089c8: Get lost, you've already got a coffin, I ain't givin' you anotha.
textByHash.bce9c0e69050fa478a4288f6dc2ada482c011635: Depends, you got any locks for it?
textByHash.7f90f5f2b35242c47e2d49839425f1eac4ebad86: Yeah, well clear off them a go find one.
